name: Smart Neck & Shoulder Massager
description: An intelligent EMS pulse massager with 6 massage modes, 15 intensity levels, and ergonomic heated pads. Targets cervical tension, promotes blood circulation, and melts away stress in minutes. Rechargeable, whisper-quiet, and travel-friendly.

name: Anti-Gravity Flame Aroma Diffuser
description: A stunning ultrasonic diffuser that creates a gravity-defying water droplet effect resembling a flickering flame. Whisper-quiet humidifier with 7 ambient LED color modes, auto shut-off safety, and compatibility with all essential oils. Transforms any room into a spa sanctuary.

name: Smart LED Facial Therapy Mask
description: A professional 7-color LED photon therapy mask delivering targeted wavelengths for anti-aging, acne treatment, and skin rejuvenation. Medical-grade silicone, adjustable intensity, and a built-in 20-minute smart timer. Dermatologist-recommended technology now accessible at home.
